messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useCallback has a missing dependency: 'q.difficulty'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [awarded, activeTeam?.id, store, sq.id, q.difficulty, teams, triggerReaction, answerPhrases.correct, answerPhrases.wrong, points, onClose]
